name: Black Wolfberry:WuJing
short_description: This is a third-person action shooter where you need to break through a maze
detailed_description:
This is a journey to the West from a parallel universe. After three dozen white bone essence, Sun Wukong is squeezed out of the workplace and framed, take the team falls apart again. Big brother Sun Wukong angrily returned to the Huaguo mountain, two brother Pig eight quit is along the slope of the donkey back to Miss high. As for the master Tang Sanzang is no surprise and was captured by the monster. You will play three apprentice Sha Wujing, with their own power to kill the siege, save Tang Seng.
This is a third-person action shooter where you need to break through a maze. With animated plot and BOSS battle, it is a short magic change story game.
